ItacAcademyItem.Name: Sborrati (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Rakes in the centre of a shperical figure joined by two snakes who bite a sort of star above the impresa from which star pours blood
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: On the Sborrati, see Mazzi, vol. 2, pp. 414-5
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
